description_long: This is a modern flat-screen television with a large, rectangular display and a minimalistic design. The screen is bordered by a thin, black bezel, giving it a sleek and contemporary appearance. The television is supported by a metallic, angular stand that provides stability and elevates the screen above the surface. The back of the television is plain and unadorned, with no visible branding or ports. The side profile reveals the ultra-thin depth of the display, emphasizing its lightweight and space-saving construction. The overall aesthetic is clean and functional, suitable for both residential and commercial urban environments.
description: A sleek, modern flat-screen television with a thin black bezel and a metallic stand, featuring a large display and minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large display screen with a thin black bezel and a metallic stand beneath.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the ultra-thin profile of the television and the angular metallic stand.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, unmarked back panel and the full structure of the stand.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again emphasizing the slimness of the screen and the stand's support.
attribute_bezel_design: Thin black bezel, matte finish, minimalistic and modern styling.
